description: Apply custom patterns of find-and-replace in succession to text.

manifest.author: Jacob Levernier
manifest.description: Apply custom patterns of find-and-replace in succession to text.
manifest.name: Apply Patterns

name: Apply Patterns

releases.author: jglev
releases.description:
- Added new Notes field for pattern rules. (#63)
- Switched most text boxes for larger, resizable "text areas."
- Switched from displaying compiled regexes in Notices to using text-selectable Modals. (#28)
releases.name: 2.2.0-beta0

releases.author: jglev
releases.description: - Fixed bug whereby non-compliant patterns would not be filtered correctly, causing other patterns to be filtered in their place. (Fixes #58)

releases.author: jglev
releases.description: - Fixed bug whereby non-compliant patterns would not be filtered correctly, causing other patterns to be filtered in their place. (Fixes #58)
releases.name: 2.1.2-beta0

releases.author: jglev
releases.description:
- Fixed bug whereby final cursor position was not always being calculated or applied correctly.
- Fixed bug whereby cursor position was not being saved consistently when multiple fields were updated simultaneously in the Settings interface.

releases.author: jglev
releases.description:
- Added icons for commands
- Added icon setting for custom commands
- Upgraded dependencies

releases.author: jglev
releases.description:
- Added commands to use the clipboard.
- Added inline Regex validation in Settings page.

Special thanks to @FelipeRearden for testing this release, and for suggesting the use of the clipboard originally in #9. :tada: :rocket: :pray:

releases.author: jglev
releases.description:
**This is a beta release.** Please back up your plugin data before testing it.

**Changes:**

- Added commands to use the clipboard.
- Added inline Regex validation in Settings page.
releases.name: 2.0.0-beta0

releases.author: jglev
releases.description: Fixed a bug whereby new installations of Apply Patterns would fail.

releases.author: jglev
releases.description:
A significant release! :tada:

- The Settings menu has been completely redesigned, and should now be more mobile-friendly.
- The position of the cursor, or selection of text, after applying a pattern is now able to be customized from the Settings menu.
- Links in the Readme have been updated.
- Patterns and Rules now ask for confirmation before being deleted.

Thank you to @claremacrae and @feliperearden for beta testing earlier versions of this release!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Added the ability to collapse Patterns, following #18.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: I'm unsure of the root cause, but a bug appeared whereby `{{date}}` strings were unable to be parsed because [Chrono](https://github.com/wanasit/chrono) could not be imported fully. This seems to have something to do with dependency versions: by using [`yarn.lock` from commit `1916f780df6eb80cd471a83a6181dd0096a96f8c`](https://github.com/schemar/obsidian-tasks/blob/1916f780df6eb80cd471a83a6181dd0096a96f8c/yarn.lock) of the `tasks` plugin and then re-installing dependencies with `yarn`, the issue resolved itself. :woman_shrugging: This obviously warrants further investigation!

releases.author: jglev
releases.description:
- "Apply to whole document" command has been added
- Users can now more easily import, export, and clear plugin settings.
- `\n` is now parsed correctly in `To` strings.
- Custom commands have been added (via the Settings tab).

releases.author: jglev
releases.description: - Fixed bug whereby after selecting a pattern to apply, the user would not be able to type new text into the editor until either (a) opening a new Modal (such as the Command Palette) or switching away and back to the window.

releases.author: jglev
releases.description:
- Added ability to filter Patterns in the Settings tab.
  - Currently, the user must click the Magnifying Glass icon to refresh the search.
- Added ability to re-arrange Patterns in the Settings tab.

releases.author: jglev
releases.description:
Initial release. Adds two commands to the source editor:

- `Apply Patterns: Apply pattern to whole lines` will loop over each line that is selected in the editor, and apply the Pattern to the entirety of each line.
- `Apply Patterns: Apply pattern to selection` will apply the Pattern to just the text selected in the editor, as one (potentially multi-line) string.

`{{date}}` strings are validated and parsed before Regular Expression parsing occurs.
